_notes: Source: tk-soft-patient (constrained custom profile). Target: R4 base patient (unconstrained). Most drifts are relaxations: source enforces cardinalities and MustSupport that the R4 base does not. Custom extensions and slicing are removed in target.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [tk-pat-1 (error: Patient must have at least a family name or a given name), tk-pat-2 (warning: Active patients should have at least one telecom)]. R4 base has no custom root constraints.
Source extension slicing removed in target (R4 base has no extension slicing). Source defines slices: employeeId, preferredLanguage, ethnicGroup.
Extension employeeId[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (R4 base does not define this extension).
Extension preferredLanguage[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Extension ethnicGroup[0..1 mustSupport=false] present in source is removed in target.
identifier cardinality relaxed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MustSupport removed.
MustSupport removed on identifier (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
Identifier slicing removed in target: source has named slices [mrn[1..1], national[0..1]]; R4 base has no identifier slicing.
Mandatory slice mrn[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target (R4 base has no named identifier slices).
Optional slice national[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target.
identifier:mrn.system cardinality relaxed from [1..1 mustSupport=true] to [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base, no slice constraint).
identifier:mrn.value cardinality relaxed from [1..1 mustSupport=true] to [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base, no slice constraint).
MustSupport removed on active (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false, both [0..1]).
name cardinality relaxed: source [1..*] → target [0..*]. Min decreased.
MustSupport removed on name (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
MustSupport removed on name.family, name.given, and name.prefix (source mustSupport=true on all; R4 base does not constrain name sub-elements).
telecom cardinality relaxed: source [1..5 mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and max cap removed.
MustSupport removed on telecom (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
telecom.system and telecom.value cardinality relaxed from [1..1 mustSupport=true] to [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base has no telecom sub-element constraints).
telecom.use MustSupport removed and required binding on contact-point-use removed (source mustSupport=true required; R4 base does not constrain telecom.use).
gender cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MustSupport removed.
MustSupport removed on gender (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).

Binding version pin added in target: Source uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/administrative-gender) without version pin. R4 base uses required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/administrative-gender|4.0.1) with explicit version pin.
birthDate cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false]. Min decreased and MustSupport removed.
MustSupport removed on birthDate (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
deceased[x] MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
MustSupport removed on address (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
MustSupport removed on address.line, address.city, address.state, address.postalCode, and address.country (source mustSupport=true on all; R4 base does not constrain address sub-elements).

maritalStatus binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/marital-status). Different value sets, same strength.
photo cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] → target [0..*]. Ban removed in R4 base.

contact.relationship binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/contact-relationship) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/patient-contactrelationship). Different value sets, same strength.
MustSupport removed on contact.relationship, contact.name, and contact.telecom (source mustSupport=true; R4 base does not constrain contact sub-elements).

communication.language binding changed: source extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages). Different value set and strength weakened from extensible to preferred.
MustSupport removed on generalPractitioner (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
Reference target removed: source constrains to tk-soft/Practitioner; R4 base has no target profile constraint on generalPractitioner.
MustSupport removed on managingOrganization (source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false).
Reference target removed: source constrains to tk-soft/Organization; R4 base has no target profile constraint on managingOrganization.
